metadata.source: FBI Uniform Crime Reporting (UCR) Program via Wikipedia tables
metadata.description: CBSA-level violent and property crime rates per 100,000 residents. Primary cities matched against Wikipedia tables of FBI UCR 2022 data (Table 8, offenses known to law enforcement). Unmatched CBSAs use state-level averages from available city data within that state. National average used as last-resort fallback. Year-over-year trends computed from state-level violent crime rates (2018-2024).
